summary: 9 tests passing. TDD anchors from task spec all covered: 409 dedup (returns false, no console.error), 201 happy path (returns true), PAYLOAD_API_KEY not in error logs. Additional tests for resolveTagIds and loadTagMap add good coverage.

findings.finding: Tests use jest module import cache — each `await import('../../scripts/sync-telegram')` in the same describe block returns the cached module. This means PAYLOAD_API_KEY set in beforeAll is correctly inherited. No isolation issues detected because beforeEach resets mockFetch.
findings.reason: Jest module cache behavior is correct here. Tests are deterministic.

findings.finding: loadTagMap tests mock fetch but do not verify the exact URL called (e.g., `expect(mockFetch).toHaveBeenCalledWith(expect.stringContaining('/api/tags'))`).
findings.reason: URL verification would be testing implementation detail. Behavior (return value) is already tested. Acceptable coverage level for this scope.

findings.finding: All 3 TDD anchors from task spec are present and passing: 409 dedup, 201 happy path, PAYLOAD_API_KEY not in logs.
